title: Centaur native OMP collaboration room control contract
description: Canonical contract shared between the Slack ingress (slackbotv2) and the api-rs room lifecycle implementation (centaur-3w2.6). The resident OMP host (centaur-3w2.5) uses camelCase at the RPC boundary and normalizes to this snake_case API shape.

start.idempotent_note: If already active, returns existing room without re-creating

status.null_room_note: room is null when no live room — ingress posts 'No active collaboration room.'

stop.idempotent_note: stopped=false means there was no room to stop (idempotent success)

join_url.description: Full omp join-capable tailnet URL from the resident host. Ingress forwards verbatim — never synthesizes the relay prefix.

409.description: Ownership conflict — a resident host holds the session and blocks start

errors.standard: Standard ApiError JSON for other failures

ingress_rules.posix_escaping: Embedded single quotes in join_url replaced with the four-character sequence '\'' (close quote, backslash-escaped quote, reopen quote)
ingress_rules.no_synthesis: Ingress never spawns OMP or synthesizes the tailnet relay prefix — join_url comes verbatim from the resident host
ingress_rules.no_raw_control_url: No raw full-control URL or browser link is posted — only the omp join command
ingress_rules.no_agent_turn: Stop, status, and failures all short-circuit before normal agent execution
ingress_rules.exactly_one_command: Start posts exactly one copyable shell command

sample_output.stop_idempotent: No active collaboration room to close.
sample_output.malformed: Unknown /collab arguments: `frobnicate`. Usage: `/collab` (start), `/collab status`, or `/collab stop`.
